clusters.failureShape: A heading element has no text content, so it introduces a section with no information and breaks heading-based navigation.
clusters.fix: Remove empty heading tags or give the section a short, descriptive heading. Don't use empty headings for visual spacing — use CSS.

clusters.failureShape: A heading's text doesn't describe the section it labels, so users scanning by heading can't tell what the section contains.
clusters.fix: Write headings that accurately summarize the content that follows, specific enough to be useful out of context.

clusters.failureShape: A whole paragraph of text is marked up as a heading, so the heading outline is polluted with body content instead of a concise label.
clusters.fix:
Use a short descriptive heading for the section and keep the body text in a paragraph (

).
